Bash(git commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
Initial commit: OCG (OnChannel Gaming) Guide Generator

AI-powered Star Citizen guide generator using Gemini + YouTube.

Features:
- Topic discovery (What''s Hot, SC Pulse Check, AI Suggests, Search)
- YouTube video analysis via Gemini API
- Markdown guide generation with streaming progress
- Guide review/edit/approve workflow
- Dashboard with stats
- Settings management (curated topics, API config)

Tech stack:
- PHP 8+ with SQLite database
- Vanilla JavaScript (no frameworks)
- YouTube Data API v3
- Google Gemini API

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)")
